_note: Temporal recall benchmark. Plants topically-similar events at KNOWN times (days_ago), then asks time-scoped queries where ONLY the timestamp disambiguates. Baseline (semantic-only) can't tell them apart because embeddings ignore time; the time-aware boost should surface the right-window memory first. Scored deterministically: does the target-window fact rank before the wrong-window one, and does the reply stay on the right one.
filler: Has a younger brother named Chris

events.utterance: I went to the dentist yesterday for a cleaning
facts: Went to the dentist for a cleaning

events.utterance: I had a dentist appointment for a filling last month
facts: Went to the dentist for a filling
